meta.title: Starship Flight 4 // 4k Slow Mo & Clean Audio
meta.description:
Enjoy this incredible audio and video from around the launch pad of the most powerful rocket to ever fly, SpaceX's Starship on its 4th orbital-ish flight test, #IFT4! 4K slow motion captured on various ZCam's, Freefly Ember, BlackMagic 12K Ursa, RED Komodo X and G2 4.6K with SIGMA lenses and Meade Telescopes.

SpaceX's 4th launch of Starship took place on June 6th, 2024, from Starbase, TX. Both the Super Heavy booster and the Starship upper stage completed their full duration burn placing them on nominal trajectories and both made it to a soft splashdown for the first time.

New merch out now!!!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

To license content: Ryan@CosmicPerspective.com

https://www.youtube.com/cosmicperspective

VR content - https://cosmicperspective.com/

End song: "Cryo" by Everyday Astronaut

Everyday Astronaut and Cosmic Perspective:  Tim Dodd, Ryan Chylinski, Andrew Keating, Spencer Tetik, MaryLiz Chylinski, Jason Achilles, Eric Davis, Benny Burtt, Trevor Sesnic, Andrew Taylor, Collin Thrash, Ben Stineman, Ryan & Ella Kronenburg, Guinn Partners, Sigma America and Freefly Systems

00:00 - Close Cam
02:54 - Pad Cam
03:40 - Tim Reaction
04:03 - Spencer inside LUNA
04:54 - Rio Wide
05:35 - Rio Spotter
07:20 - Rio Tracker

--------------------------
